sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n22912" key="grusmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">γρυσμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">γρύζω</etym>) <sense id="n22912.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a grunting</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0688.tlg001:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathocl.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
